backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Raj Empire Esports backend, defining data types and CRUD operations for players, tournaments, registrations, support tickets, OTPs, terms, and social links, with role-based access control via MixinAuthorization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (fire gradient theme, home page, player auth flow, etc.) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary providing one-line summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the purpose and contents of every component, page, hook, and config file.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for the light and dark color themes used by shadcn-ui components.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React app, loading Rajdhani, Orbitron, and Saira Condensed fonts from Google Fonts and mounting the app at the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes (home, player auth, tournaments, dashboard, terms, admin), wraps them in AuthProvider and AdminAuthProvider, and provides a shared Layout with Header and Footer.
frontend/src/components/AdminProtectedRo: Route guard component that redirects unauthenticated admin users to /admin using AdminAuthContext.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying the brand logo, quick navigation links, and social media icons (YouTube, Instagram, Telegram) fetched from the backend via useGetSocialLinks.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with logo, desktop/mobile nav links, and conditional auth controls (login/logout/register) plus an admin shield link.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout wrapper that renders the Header, a main content area via React Router's Outlet, and a Footer.
frontend/src/components/PaymentModal.tsx: Modal for tournament registration that lets users upload a payment screenshot, tracks upload progress, and submits the registration via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/ProtectedRoute.t: Route guard component that redirects unauthenticated users to the login page and renders children only when authenticated.
frontend/src/context/AdminAuthContext.ts: React context providing admin authentication state with hardcoded credentials, persisted via localStorage.
frontend/src/context/AuthContext.tsx: React context managing player session state (login/logout) with localStorage persistence and React Query cache clearing on logout.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Hook and provider for Internet Identity authentication via DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing identity state, login/clear functions, and login status flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks wrapping all backend actor calls for tournaments, registrations, players, social links, terms, and mutations like registration and profile updates.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts (Orbitron, Rajdhani, Exo 2), sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities, defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, and adds brand gradient and scrollbar utilities.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with TanStack QueryClientProvider and a custom InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin dashboard page with a sidebar navigation supporting tabs for tournaments, registrations, players, terms, support tickets, and social links, using various query hooks to fetch and mutate backend data.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLoginPage.tsx: Admin login page with username/password form that authenticates via AdminAuthContext and redirects to the admin dashboard on success.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Player dashboard page with tabs for browsing/filtering tournaments, viewing personal registrations with status badges, and viewing profile information.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Public landing page featuring a hero section with CTA buttons and a features grid highlighting the platform's tournament offerings for BGMI players.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Two-step player login page that sends an OTP via a backend mutation, verifies it, fetches the user profile, and navigates to the player dashboard on success.
frontend/src/pages/RegisterPage.tsx: Multi-step player registration page collecting display name, mobile, and BGMI Player ID, verified via OTP, then registering and saving the profile before redirecting on success.
frontend/src/pages/TermsPage.tsx: Displays the platform's Terms & Conditions fetched from the backend (with a hardcoded fallback), parsing numbered sections and rendering them with alternating colored borders.
frontend/src/pages/TournamentsPage.tsx: Public tournaments listing page with search and status filter controls; unauthenticated users are redirected to login when attempting to register, while authenticated users get a PaymentModal.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routes, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom brand colors (red/orange fire gradient), Orbitron/Rajdhani/Exo 2 fonts, border radii, box shadows, and accordion animations for the esports platform theme.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing the Raj Empire Esports Arena BGMI tournament platform, its implemented features, known deployment issues, architectural notes, and image requirements.
